title: Preview recorded video in-app after screen recording finishes

requirements.text: After a screen recording is completed in the ScreenRecorder component, display an in-app video preview player so the admin can review the recorded video directly within the app before deciding to upload or download it. The preview should use the recorded Blob/MediaStream data already available in memory (no upload required to preview). The existing download button must remain visible alongside the new preview player.

quotes: cuando termino de grabar un video de analisis, me da la posibilidad de descargarlo pero no de poder revisarlo directamente desde la app

acceptanceCriteria: After stopping a screen recording, a video preview player appears in the ScreenRecorder UI showing the just-recorded video using a local object URL derived from the recorded Blob.
The admin can play, pause, and scrub through the recorded video without uploading it to the backend.
The existing download button remains accessible alongside the preview player.
The preview player is clearly labelled (e.g., 'Recording Preview') so the admin understands they are reviewing the local recording before upload.
The preview player is dismissed/cleared when the admin proceeds to upload the video or starts a new recording.
No backend changes are required; the preview uses only in-memory/local object URL data.

constraints: Do not remove or hide the existing download button that appears after recording stops.
The preview must use a local object URL (URL.createObjectURL) from the recorded Blob — do not upload to backend just to preview.
Do not modify any file under frontend/src/hooks/ immutable paths.
nonGoals: Saving or persisting the preview state to the backend.
Adding preview functionality to the public video gallery or VideoManagementPanel.
Changing the upload flow or upload form fields.
Adding preview for manually uploaded videos (only screen recording post-capture preview is in scope).
